title: garnotia arundinacea
intro: Garnotia arundinacea, also known as Java grass or rice grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Garnotia arundinacea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Garnotia arundinacea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
